summary: Comprehensive testing of trifold brochure design fixes completed successfully. All 3 reported bugs from iteration 3 have been resolved: CTA text capitalization, image flush positioning, and color values.
passed_tests: Panel 6 CTA text appears as uppercase 'НЕ ОТКЛАДЫВАЙТЕ ЗДОРОВЬЕ НА ПОТОМ'
Panel 2 doctors image positioned flush to bottom (position: absolute, bottom: 0)
Panel 3 needles image positioned flush to bottom (position: absolute, bottom: 0)
No #888 or #999 color values remain in CSS
All headings on Page 2 aligned with consistent 13mm padding-top
All 4 images (desk, QR code, doctors, needles) load correctly
